name: Sokol KV-2
tagline: The Soyuz launch-entry suit, mandatory since the 1971 Soyuz 11 decompression deaths
description: Soft pressure suit worn inside the Soyuz descent module on every launch and re-entry since 1973. Back-entry seam (laced shut), fixed helmet with flip-up visor, umbilical for O₂ + comms + cooling water. Not designed for spacewalking — it is the backup that keeps the crew alive long enough to land if cabin pressure fails.
best_known_for: The only suit worn on Soyuz — created after the Soyuz 11 decompression deaths in 1971
